data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for real-time status updates indicating when a booking has been claimed by another user. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation that such status updates were implemented or tested, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, the linked use case mentions the need for real-time status updates, but there is no evidence of this functionality being present in the prior steps.
gaps: No evidence of real-time status updates being implemented or tested.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for real-time status updates
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the real-time status update functionality.
